color.$description: Raw palette. Dark-first (kuroko = black), cool blue/purple temperature with a violet glow. Deep indigo-black surfaces, cool off-white text, violet primary + blue secondary accents. Semantic roles live in semantic.json.

ink.$description: Cool indigo near-blacks — the stagehand's black, tuned violet. Surfaces.

fog.$description: Cool off-whites / lavender-greys — text on dark.

violet.$description: The signature accent — vibrant violet, the source of the glow.

blue.$description: Secondary accent — cool blue/indigo for the blue-purple duo and gradients.

teal.$description: Tertiary accent — complementary teal against the violet/indigo field. Eyebrows, small labels, counterpoint highlights.

glow.$description: The signature blue/purple bloom. Violet (accent) and blue variants for buttons, focus, and hero backdrops. RGB tracks color.violet.500 (139,92,246) and color.blue.500 (99,102,241).

elevation.$description: Subtle depth for the dark brand — soft, low, no harsh black. Pair with a hairline border on raised surfaces. A deliberate step up from the Phase 1 flat stance.

easing.$description: Restrained, purposeful motion. Respect prefers-reduced-motion in consumers.

surface.$description: Semantic surface roles (dark theme). Components reference these, not raw palette.

accent.$description: Primary = violet (glowing). Secondary = blue, for the blue/purple duo and gradients.

fontFamily.$description: System sans stack for v0 (brand typeface swaps in later via the same pipeline).

fontSize.$description: UI scale (from HQ) plus display sizes for the marketing hero.
